script.name: CREATE_log_conts
script.text: IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[log_cont]') AND type in (N'U')) CREATE TABLE [log_cont]( [dt] [datetime] NULL, [comm] [nvarchar](max) NULL ) ON [PRIMARY] TEXTIMAGE_ON [PRIMARY]

script.name: FK_M_IDX_OX_ContractorPersonPermTmp
script.text: ALTER TABLE [ContractorPersonPermTmp] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_M_IDX_OX_ContractorPersonPermTmp] FOREIGN KEY([OrganizationItemEmployee]) REFERENCES [OrganizationItem] ([Id]) IF (OBJECT_ID('FK_M_IDX_OX_ContractorPersonPermTmp', 'F') IS NULL) BEGIN ALTER TABLE [ContractorPersonPermTmp] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_M_IDX_OX_ContractorPersonPermTmp] FOREIGN KEY([OrganizationItemEmployee]) REFERENCES [OrganizationItem] ([Id]) END

script.name: FK_M_IDX_CONST_OX_ContractorPersonPermTmp
script.text: ALTER TABLE [ContractorPersonPermTmp] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_M_IDX_OX_ContractorPersonPermTmp] IF (OBJECT_ID('FK_M_IDX_OX_ContractorPersonPermTmp', 'F') IS NULL) BEGIN ALTER TABLE [ContractorPersonPermTmp] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_M_IDX_OX_ContractorPersonPermTmp] END

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: MERGE INTO TelephonyUserSettings tus USING (SELECT :userName pName, :number pNumber, :telIsOn pIsTelephony, :isOnline pIsOnline) source ON (tus.UserName = source.pName) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET tus.Number = source.pNumber, tus.TelephonyIsOn = source.pIsTelephony, tus.IsOnline = source.pIsOnline WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (UserName, Number, TelephonyIsOn, IsOnline) VALUES (source.pName, source.pNumber, source.pIsTelephony, source.pIsOnline);

procedure.name: LeadBinding
MarketingGroupRecalc
MarketingActivityRecalc
procedure.text:
CREATE procedure [MarketingActivityRecalc] (@activity bigint) as BEGIN UPDATE mb SET DirtyLeadCount = (SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM Lead WHERE MarketingActivity = mb.Id), CleanLeadCount = (SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM Lead WHERE MarketingActivity = mb.Id AND IsDeleted <> 1 AND Status <> 4), AcceptedLeadCount = (SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM Lead WHERE MarketingActivity = mb.Id AND IsDeleted <> 1 AND Status in (1,2,3)), QualifiedLeadCount = (SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM Lead WHERE MarketingActivity = mb.Id AND IsDeleted <> 1 AND Status in (2)) FROM MarketingEffect me LEFT JOIN MarketingBase mb ON mb.Id = me.Id WHERE me.MarketingActivity = @activity;
UPDATE mb SET DirtyLeadCount = (SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM Lead WHERE MarketingGroup = mb.Id), CleanLeadCount = (SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM Lead WHERE MarketingGroup = mb.Id AND IsDeleted <> 1 AND Status <> 4), AcceptedLeadCount = (SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM Lead WHERE MarketingGroup = mb.Id AND IsDeleted <> 1 AND Status in (1,2,3)), QualifiedLeadCount = (SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM Lead WHERE MarketingGroup = mb.Id AND IsDeleted <> 1 AND Status in (2)) FROM MarketingBase mb WHERE mb.Id = @activity; END

procedure.name: UpdateCategoryPermissions
UpdateContractorSlavePerm
AddUpdateContractorPermissions
DelUpdateContractorPermissions
CheckPermWhenDelCategories
CheckPermWhenAddCategories
CheckPermWhenAddLeadCategories
CheckPermWhenDelLeadCategories
AddUpdateLeadPermissions
DelUpdateLeadPermissions
AddUpdateContactPermissions
AddUpdateSalePermissions
DelUpdateContactPermissions
DelUpdateSalePermissions
CheckInheritedPermission
AddDefaultCategoriesContractor
AddDefaultCategoriesLead

index.name: p_ContractorPersonPermissionUpd
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX p_ContractorPersonPermissionUpd ON [ContractorPersonPermissionUpd] ([USERSECURITYSETCACHEID]) INCLUDE ([PERMISSIONID],[User],[Group],[ORGANIZATIONITEMPOSITION],[PERMISSIONROLE],[ORGANIZATIONITEMEMPLOYEE])

index.name: P_ContactPersonPermissionUpd
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX P_ContactPersonPermissionUpd ON [ContactPersonPermissionUpd] ([USERSECURITYSETCACHEID]) INCLUDE ([PERMISSIONID],[User],[Group],[ORGANIZATIONITEMPOSITION],[PERMISSIONROLE],[ORGANIZATIONITEMEMPLOYEE])

index.name: P_LeadPersonPermissionUpd
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX P_LeadPersonPermissionUpd ON [LeadPersonPermissionUpd] ([USERSECURITYSETCACHEID]) INCLUDE ([PERMISSIONID],[User],[Group],[ORGANIZATIONITEMPOSITION],[PERMISSIONROLE],[ORGANIZATIONITEMEMPLOYEE])

index.name: P_SalePersonPermissionUpd
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX P_SalePersonPermissionUpd ON [SalePersonPermissionUpd] ([USERSECURITYSETCACHEID]) INCLUDE ([PERMISSIONID],[User],[Group],[ORGANIZATIONITEMPOSITION],[PERMISSIONROLE],[ORGANIZATIONITEMEMPLOYEE])

index.name: P_RelationshipPersonPermissionUpd
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX P_RelationshipPersonPermissionUpd ON [RelationshipPersonPermissionUpd] ([USERSECURITYSETCACHEID]) INCLUDE ([PERMISSIONID],[User],[Group],[ORGANIZATIONITEMPOSITION],[PERMISSIONROLE],[ORGANIZATIONITEMEMPLOYEE])

index.name: U_Country_CountryCode
index.text: CREATE UNIQUE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [U_Country_CountryCode] ON [Country] ([CountryCode]) WHERE [CountryCode] > 0
